name: @aily-project/board-df_esp32s3_aicam
description: The DFRobot ESP32-S3 AI CAM is a compact camera development board based on the ESP32-S3 chip, integrating an OV3660 camera module, LED, microphone, speaker, and infrared, designed for AI vision applications such as image recognition, object detection, and video streaming over Wi-Fi.
author: vonweller
